mapper.update: update document_blocks set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, document_id = #{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_block_id = #{parentBlockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, block_type = #{blockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, props_json = #{propsJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, content_json = #{contentJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, order_key = #{orderKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where document_block_id = #{documentBlockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select document_block_id, company_id, document_id, parent_block_id, block_type, props_json, content_json, order_key, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at from document_blocks where document_block_id = #{documentBlockId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select document_block_id, company_id, document_id, parent_block_id, block_type, props_json, content_json, order_key, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at from document_blocks where company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and document_id = #{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and upper(coalesce(trim(status), 'ACTIVE')) = 'ACTIVE' order by coalesce(parent_block_id, ''), order_key asc, created_at asc
